ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the restaurant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine" TEXT /* Type of cuisine offered */,
  "zomato_url" TEXT /* URL link to the restaurant's Zomato page */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the restaurant */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the restaurant's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the restaurant's location */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dishes" (
  "dish_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dish */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant offering the dish */,
  "dish_name" TEXT /* Name of the dish */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the dish */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dish */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the dish (e.g., vegetarian, non-vegetarian) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL link to an image of the dish */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dish_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dishes_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant being rated */,
  "dining_rating" REAL /* Average dining rating */,
  "dining_rating_count" INTEGER /* Count of dining ratings */,
  "delivery_rating" REAL /* Average delivery rating */,
  "delivery_rating_count" INTEGER /* Count of delivery ratings */,
  "overall_rating" REAL /* Overall average rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant offering the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Home Delivery, Indoor Seating) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user placing the order */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant from which the order is placed */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, delivered, cancelled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant offering the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotional offer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user for the restaurant */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the reservation */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant for the reservation */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date of the reservation */,
  "guest_count" INTEGER /* Number of guests for the reservation */,
  "table_number" INTEGER /* Number of the table reserved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., confirmed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Delivery address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the delivery address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the delivery address */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the delivery address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the delivery address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_addresses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery partner */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery partner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the delivery partner */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the delivery partner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant offering the loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_per_dollar" REAL /* Number of points earned per dollar spent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_programs_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_orders" (
  "user_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., delivered, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_orders_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
